articles.author: AJ Dellinger
articles.title: MicroStrategy Says Drop the Micro, It’s Cleaner
articles.description: The tech company turned Bitcoin repository is changing its name.
articles.content: Michael Saylor is apparently done thinking small. The founder and CEO of MicroStrategy announced Wednesday that his company would be dropping the “Micro” from its name, instead operating as Strategy.… [+2833 chars]
